textByHash.52a9fed8c3c3fabc4b0742115b1e2a997107ffbf: Almost certainly, I am a great practitioner of the magic arts, after all.
textByHash.552948119adae68dc2f49e3756cb67265dd58ecc: That is true and an epic battle it was too.
textByHash.a6c51d732e97a49dfa8c7dfa2bd8d445734bff2a: Of course I won! As I've already stated I am a master of the magic arts.
textByHash.b21880fc51aa554d625f4589b17895598cccc976: Why do you want to know how to kill a Tanglefoot?
textByHash.72bb41c04ac5f0736d95822452e2f9fc13a70d5d: I see. Well I could tell you how to defeat your Tanglefoot, however I would need you to perform a little undertaking for me first.
textByHash.25c3b5c3a3bad5281d3e2e83effde8266be6b5a4: To the north-east of here is a haunted manor. Bring me a skull from a grave you find there and you shall have your answer.
textByHash.825e41d8210eaa73573f0a5cae1f835a54c9d067: Right then, to business. A Tanglefoot can not be harmed by might nor magic. The only weapon that can damage them are a pair of enchanted secateurs!
textByHash.d2abc4e1a973c7edb2175c7c39c44a22653f6fa5: You will have to make them... listen carefully and I'll tell you how.
textByHash.2b713abdbc6287ab4c8fea682e04a8809ec2b26c: Obviously you will need a pair of secateurs, you will also need to gather , and .
textByHash.edcf5c171a21bf1081561f64baa45f1c050bc3c1: Take them to the Nature Spirit and ask him to perform the ceremony of Phasma Phasmatis Natura.
textByHash.3b5178b5bb0cc942982906aed37e1a3457989fe1: Yes, that's all. You'll be able to use those secateurs to kill the monster.
textByHash.c049601d962234b84e7563f96d025e9065d196fb: So, have you brought me the skull?
textByHash.1341f0e2f83480eb1cbb4d2d8156a715a08a7a3b: Well come and talk to me once you have it.
textByHash.dc0d18757a6ab1292833153a9cc092a36be39dd6: I have already told you all I know about fighting a Tanglefoot. What more would you have of me?
textByHash.43c4f68b7e9f933737ea835113841b22b28386f9: I guess so. Forgot to take notes did you? Well, listen carefully this time. You will need to enchant a pair of secateurs. Only these can harm a Tanglefoot.
textByHash.f756c619f84d2958653d6d5fe3efcbc75bce70aa: You will need a pair of secateurs. You will also need to gather , and .
textByHash.f05a123f4de0dd6e4ed06dfe9834cb607dbea445: So, , your curiosity leads you to speak to me?
textByHash.4596391e0a033fa3c915852c149a581102e8da88: Not when you're dressed like that! I don't help Saradominist filth!
textByHash.9af3e03d19040ead4fb898c2b49884b33dadae42: And of all the people in the world, you came to ask ME? [laugh][laugh]!
textByHash.ddbf6f519c5dbcacbf483c06b8053a40cf908bfd: Oh, I'll help! I'll give you GOOD help!
textByHash.313e4aaf63b42a2304bddd8f5cf67a367081f18f: An army, eh? I can raise you a lovely army of the undead skeletal magi! That'd be just right, wouldn't it?
textByHash.0e1c97a37a1888702d6ae842d697e181378601af: No, I'll keep the fun bits for myself. You'll just have to get a few things for me.
textByHash.1eff94925832f181b8f6296188db30f5dafad8dc: Firstly, I need 7 bones, the normal sort you get from people and small monsters.
textByHash.4000cb26bd70799c9e7ebc67dcee7935144b5dc1: Hah! And I thought only necromancers and jogres carried bones around with them! Very well, hand 'em over.
textByHash.67624b8a43012a2ac70581e054af342100514ce4: Bones! I need bones, the normal sort you get from humans and small monsters. If you're having trouble, go to the highwaymen just north of here - they've got bones!
textByHash.b4a0f2e30955f4cec14d2adec7988c2602b55361: From the bones you have given me, I shall make bone seeds. These will contain the essence of your army. But you will need some way to carry the seeds.
textByHash.60e0ce9d7262f7ac0b915a1c45398ede6a9dd1f9: You must go to the Crafting Guild to ask the advice of the master crafters. There are quite a few of them there, and one of them's sure to help.
textByHash.0ef30485dabd5b4bc650ba7c1aee4bee349d1449: Is there something wrong with your memory? I told you to go to the Crafting Guild to ask the master crafters for advice on transporting bone seeds.
textByHash.44031bc2c8c21cabdd62b513bbae1fddd444b646: You can take that Saradominist attire off before you try speaking to me about your quest again!
textByHash.51bcd21e007cf68c55ead7f91006d0dd1e7b4621: Ah, excellent. [laugh][laugh]! Have you got such a container?
textByHash.be5d7514eb2549ac28c76ed83489d0860c432855: I have raised you an army and bound them into bone seeds for you!
textByHash.c318bfee5a53b94dc30ce1d7501e08efa98caa54: Don't mention it, it was fun! [laugh][laugh]!
textByHash.be5bf59da2917c7ae08d7681bccc95d3fe12e367: Now I will seal the seeds into your pot.
textByHash.7142577c26e8b760b0a863bf011d6dd043f18fe8: Take the pot to the Colony and open it! [laugh][laugh]! Just don't open it before you get there.
textByHash.0e229ab3cbcd95783de8136088d6642ac1b45ad2: Bring me another of these pots with a lid and I will give you more bone seeds.
textByHash.b7370f0a81d510f15b64387f75b8736f65edec61: What now, , can't you just leave me alone to practice my art?
textByHash.8e7c331fb2f5f914d3664ca9388f47b317f166c5: Well I guess it's your lucky day! Since your last visit I've been thinking, I never use my enchanted secateurs anymore, I could sell them to you, if you like.
textByHash.fe0cccde2f5ea2f29dbce1d4a91a921a697f34fa: I could let you have them for a mere 40,000 gp.
textByHash.9f6c8743bb3e68e0d52f52e0d61759dcd34ad1f0: Well, that's my price. If you change your mind, you can come back and talk to me. Good day.
textByHash.9d59ea074db6b780e36fe1fa931d8308c65abdc7: A pleasure doing business with you.
textByHash.7bdc6f87976a960c74d6f88910558c2a24f6f469: You don't have room to hold them. Stop wasting my time.
textByHash.2c9bb3c26e30aff66d7f961a76af8e5d509a3732: You don't have 40,000 gp with you! Do you take me for a fool?
textByHash.0f0eb93da338b31014176c2300b960c3b5db7648: Fine, I might see you later then.
textByHash.91317640007ae4d5f554b9be0799a35b0e7e5810: That's ok, I shouldn't have been so abrupt with you.
textByHash.9ae85161e0fd328a47db4eae2d93ef34706f2b44: You fetch me a pot with a lid first.
textByHash.339cdd5365ed6518f910e470cb274493c0092129: Yes, yes, have fun with them!
textByHash.e20f72bceb695f4c5fb2aaf3e3de3e170aaec9f8: I am the great Malignius Mortifer, wielder of strange and terrible powers. These lowly followers of mine are dedicated students of the magical arts. Their business is to follow me and learn all they can.
textByHash.05d9ef4b806bb7c1d8cd5187e7c6ff52ee008d38: You may believe that, but even if you strike one down, another will rise up within minutes.
textByHash.ce8ccfd4d46eeea5d3968b13df8b14ee4a6d31fb: Each of my followers is a master of his chosen element. His life becomes bound to that element in a way you could not hope to understand.
textByHash.a201a9aa9e65eccd9d8c1af28a974e5b2cd44d2b: I am mastering a branch of magic that few dare to attempt: Necromancy! The fools in the Guild of Wizards shun anyone who practices this art, but there are a few in this land who know the rudiments.
textByHash.4d69201826788a6414ab299298589cbc9e334cc5: Grayzag, Invrigar, Sithik... Even Melzar studied the methods of necromancy, until an accident affected his mind. Now his spells tend to result in...
textByHash.625483745acecfea57e054050066ac15e8d80b14: Grayzag and Invrigar... Even Melzar studied the methods of necromancy, until an accident affected his mind. Now his spells tend to result in...
textByHash.a5ca3f5d583f376be3c15a7507c41da83e6f44de: ... well, let us simply say that he does NOT raise armies of undead minions.
textByHash.077fba3cf616e86a976a01b6c772984b5aeb557c: The obscure magical art of necromancy has nothing to do with Summoning.
textByHash.98cab546eba2d4e858eaa0be8b8b079436620fb5: Through necromancy, I may resurrect the bodies of those who have fallen, and bend them to my will, and even command them to tell me hidden knowledge.
textByHash.ffea0f6d0ff6e48a07378e4327dce666941ac98d: I shall not pass on my secrets lightly to any passer-by!
textByHash.dbefffe1f1e5611c15d22eb7d7fa0c8cc86e8f33: Perhaps one day you shall learn ways to summon creatures to your side, but my own work is of a different sort.
textByHash.52e8cae35844f636af15cb8e04c760a419661857: Deluded lover of Guthix, you will get no secrets from me!
textByHash.1b5442a382cccd3ee28bfdd3e927435c4e2acf27: Saradominist fool, you will get no secrets from me!
textByHash.492bfc671dbaa354c0004bc04e96ad819c4c440c: Although I note your respect for our Lord Zamorak, I am afraid the subtle secrets of necromancy must remain beyond your grasp.
textByHash.a3baf5fb1389b64257760d2a0a7a1d050f45ad22: The forces required to wield power over the dead are very difficult to control. Melzar's concentration slipped, and his spell rebounded upon him.
textByHash.50e620b1ed1aa53866913fcdbe5c49e66e31ad48: Although he did not die, his mind broke. Now he dwells amidst the beasts that fill his strange home, and when he attempts to do magic he gets... amusing results.
textByHash.c9c0ade0a51864972471f2ea142f87367f94199b: Necromancy is... still not fully understood. So few people dare to study it. Although my spells usually raise whichever undead creature I desire, they sometimes misfire. As Melzar has learnt!
textByHash.a202684dc9c8dcf547dbea451ea5036e7a378a69: I am sure your curiosity will eventually draw you to speak to me again.
textByHash.07b0bdff73bcfd444bb025d38f8e3a12b87b9cb3: I see no glimmer of understanding in your eyes; my time would be wasted trying to teach you of the subtle arts.
textByHash.6708d6bc539f1e42eaf74f1c8fd973c746e57eff: If you are truly interested in magic, perhaps you should go and speak to the Duke of Lumbridge, who lives east of this place. Perchance he will have a mission for you that will teach you something.
textByHash.1be6ebc18210e994249e4652b38e4b61fed2789e: Ah, you are an inquisitive fellow. I shall speak of the great Wizards' Tower, destroyed by fire many years ago...
textByHash.ef1ae9d69d694abc6b0547616e0e3199ff9e0a49: Many say it was the greatest building in the history of Gielinor, a magnificent monument to human ingenuity.
textByHash.79e96abbc62057d1114910d34ab59c8b78c7c10d: Yet when humans are offered great power, they so often buy it at the cost of their principles.
textByHash.8c64c8b0addc2bc272046d3d17db870947a4721a: Wizards who claimed allegiance to Saradomin began to insist that magic be restricted to the few they deemed 'worthy' of such powers.
textByHash.fd3d880b3e306fccbcf57e95622e4b3a2689a715: Before long, those who did not share their fatuous obsession with Saradomin were excluded from the Tower completely. This state of affairs could not continue.
textByHash.f1c482b03d8150df782fcc1257ee8e3b9feeefaa: One dark night, a brave band of magi loyal to the great Lord Zamorak stormed the Tower. Despite heavy losses, they fought their way up the levels until they reached the Great Library.
textByHash.ed0dcf3eb1cdd1c22d1f022238a070fb5433fdf2: Alas, they were trapped and could not steal the precious records. But before they could be defeated, the bravest of them took it upon himself to blast the writings into nothingness, destroying the library.
textByHash.60f9588bb908e57803a0965840bfec52e5ab8f35: The ensuing fire raced through the tower, and none escaped its fury. Some say that Lord Zamorak himself fanned the flames to ensure the destruction of his enemies!
textByHash.0c04b1190d500b1bd88ada770598faa1370b331e: Much of that knowledge was lost, and some has never yet been rediscovered. Still, your efforts on behalf of my colleagues have not been wasted! Once again, the forces of Zamorak can create unlimited runestones!
textByHash.94222d24b1efce4f0fca0e4db480a646b03dd64a: May the world cower in its boots!
textByHash.aad90463c1a9be25f457c90e38aae417821e13cb: I bid you farewell for now.
textByHash.5be46940a0716c3b0fcf04a0d1eeb41e318731c9: Much of that knowledge was lost, and some has never yet been rediscovered. Still, the power of magic remains in the world, and we who dedicate our lives to its study may yet perform great works...
textByHash.805e4f2b589e9a6a2e3ef2442c19a24da11e7c62: [laugh][laugh]! I never specified how long they'd stay there!
textByHash.ceb6bfb6b12176b4b4ad031ee6edcbeb594f6afd: Bah! Our garments are an outward sign of our dominance of the magical arts. You cannot simply buy them in a shop!
textByHash.07ab312835a3a0b62a7dd1a86d35f899492dc833: How about if I turn you into a mushroom to make you stop bothering me?
textByHash.a6deaa64f1f7a5b4c04ee62b600b694c2b746bec: You should take that pot a bit further away from me before you open it!
textByHash.c034872f29c039d2a1581a18ff1222c98b607c0e: Oi - stop waving your items at me!
